title: Emperor's Way
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:EmperorsWay.jpg|230px|thumb|The Emperor's Way]]
A [[Hyperspace route/Legends|spacelane]] approaching [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], the public section of the '''Emperor's Way''' was policed by elite [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] squadrons.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
